holdings.infoBox: SAMT is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash stock at 16.94%, The Timken Company at 3.06%, Marvell Technology at 2.89%, UnitedHealth Group at 2.61%, and F/m US Treasury 3 Month Bill Fund at 2.54%.

overview.description: The Strategas Macro Thematic Opportunities ETF (SAMT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of US stocks that seeks to outperform the broader market by providing exposure to multiple macro-thematic market trends. SAMT was launched on Jan 24, 2022 and is issued by Strategas.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Strategas Asset Management's SAMT ETF surpasses $60 million in AUM. Uses industry-leading macro research to identify shifts in thematic momentum.
